sections.paragraph: & שְׁבִית f. (the first form very often in קרי, the last in כתיב, and vice versâ), f. captivity (from the root שָׁבָה), Num 21:29, and captives. שׁוּב שְׁבוּת to bring back the captives (of the people), Deu 30:3 Jer 29:14 30:3 Eze 29:14 39:25 Amo 9:14 Zep 3:20 Psa 14:7 53:7 126:4 and trop. to restore any one to his former welfare and happiness. Job 42:10, וַיהֹוָה שָׁב אֶת־שְׁבוּת אִיֹּוב “and Jehovah restored Job to his prosperity.” Eze 16:53 compare verse 55 Eze 16:55 Hos 6:11.
